description: Bottom fragment: Letter from Barakāt Kohen to Meʾir, asking him to confirm that the writer had handed over a document of release to a woman in the presence of three persons standing on the landing place of a staircase, while the woman was standing behind the door; later the woman gave the document back to the writer in order to keep it. (It is not clear from the digitized image if this is related to -- or even connected to -- the top fragment or if they are unrelated.) (Information from Goitein's index card.) Needs further examination.
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
